diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: re-exports Hono class and types (Env, Handler, Context, etc.)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that exports the Hono framework and re-exports core types
+- Copy-safe detail: Entry point file, 53 lines, re-exports Hono from ./hono and types from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Type definitions for Env, Handler, Context, Input, Schema, RouterRoute
+- Internal names noticed: Env, Input, HandlerResponse, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core TypeScript type definitions for Hono including Env, Handler, Context, Input, and handler interfaces
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-only module at ~1000 lines defining Env, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, Router
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Simple Hono class that extends HonoBase, configures router, and provides public API
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, extends HonoBase, sets up router (SmartRouter with RegExpRouter/TrieRouter fallback), constructor accepts router option
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get/post/put/delete/patch/on/use methods, route, basePath, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HonoOptions, router, getPath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: Base class with routing, middleware, and request handling logic for Hono framework
+- Copy-safe detail: ~545 lines, defines route builders (get/post/put/delete/patch/on/use), implements compose for middleware, handles errors/not-found, supports grouping/basePath/mount
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with res, status, header, body, json, text, html, set/get/var
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoRequest, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class providing response methods, env access, variable storage, and routing result
+- Copy-safe detail: ~780 lines, Context class with private fields (#rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, #res, #executionCtx), implements render, setLayout, text() json() html() body() redirect() notFound()
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with param, query, queries, header, json, text, blob, formData, url, method
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, HTTPException, parseBody, CloneRawRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url, ./request/constants
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class providing param/query/header parsing and body access methods
+- Copy-safe detail: ~505 lines, HonoRequest class with body caching, decode params/queries, access headers, parse body types (json/text/blob/blob/formData), cloneRawRequest helper
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single export for matching result symbol used throughout request handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, unique symbol for match result reference
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for multipart/form-data and form-urlencoded content
+- Copy-safe detail: ~233 lines, parseBody accepts HonoRequest/Request and options (all/dot), converts FormData to key-value/object structure, handles dot notation nesting and multiple values
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility similar to koa-compose, chains handlers with error/notFound handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, takes middleware array with onError/onNotFound, returns dispatch function that chains handlers, index tracks execution, throws if next() called twice
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, getResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for throwing errors with custom responses
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error with res/status, constructor takes status and options with optional res/message/cause, getResponse returns Response with status headers
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse function
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point, exports hc and parseResponse functions and all client types
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports hc from ./client and types from ./utils, ./types
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, createProxy
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./hono-base, ./hono/request, ./types, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/paths, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client proxy builder that generates request methods for a base URL
+- Copy-safe detail: ~223 lines, hc function uses Proxy to create request chain, ClientRequestImpl handles fetch with query param path params headers body, uses buildSearchParams for URLSearchParams
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client type, ClientRequest type, ClientResponse, hc type parameters
+- Internal names noticed: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, CallbackOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./hono-base, ./router, ./types, ./client, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Complete type definitions for HTTP client including Client proxy structure, ClientResponse type, type inference helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: ~393 lines, defines ClientRequestImpl request methods with types, Client proxy type, ClientResponse with body ok status headers url json text blob, type inference for responses and requests
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: parseResponse, fetchRP, DetailedError, buildSearchParams, deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils/http-status, ./client/fetch-result-please, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, search params, deep merging options
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, mergePath removes leading/trailing slashes, buildSearchParams converts query object, deepMerge merges client request options, parseResponse wraps fetchRP for hc calls
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, detectResponseType
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch response parser with smart content-type detection and structured error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, fetchRP awaits Response, auto-detects json vs text by content-type, skips 204/304 responses, throws DetailedError with status code for non-2xx
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers Hono app with fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, fire function calls addEventListener('fetch') with handle result, handle is imported from ./handler
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: handle, fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types (FetchEvent)
+- Plain- English summary: Service Worker fetch event handler adapter wrapping Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, handle function returns async function that calls app.fetch, wraps in respondWith, forwards 404 to global fetch, FetchEvent type from ./types
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Service Worker fetch event and extendable event
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, ExtendableEvent with waitUntil hook, FetchEvent with clientId/request/respondWith/preloadResponse properties
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to first read all the specified files to gather information before creating the bench-artifacts directory and the output markdown file.
